rag_rules: Generate guarantee clauses using visible feature names and logical relations from requirement intent, without inventing identifiers.
Use AGREE syntax: guarantee "label": expression; with valid boolean expressions involving visible ports and logical operators.
generic_rules: Map requirement intent directly to contract form: output_guarantee → guarantee clause, using only visible symbols.
Use conditional logic via if-then-else in equations when deriving outputs from multiple inputs.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use int, real, bool as scalar types; never integer, boolean.
Guarantees must reference only ports or constants visible in the component scope.
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL properties (e.g., Period, Deadline) as if they are AGREE variables.
Do not assume implicit access to subcomponent ports in type-level annexes.
irrelevant_topics: AADL property names are not AGREE variables
